message:
refactor(bus): session-wide events topic for O(1) depth-independent delivery

Replace the fragile relay chain (each subprocess forwarding grandchild
events through its own emitter) with a session-wide events topic. Every
agent process now publishes directly to session/{id}/events, and the
session controller subscribes once to that topic.

This works at any depth — 3, 12, or 100 — with a single bus hop per
event instead of N-1 intermediate relays.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
